business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial property management and leasing; portfolio includes warehouse, manufacturing, and office facilities across Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Expiring policy number CP00007001 (2024). Prior carriers: Hartford Financial Services (2023, CP-5666-6137, premium 419914.35; 2021, 0000007099, premium 458666.38), Chubb Limited (2022, 7CP0004662, premium 456514.10). No cancellations across all four policy years. Loss ratios not provided.

positives: Only 1 claim reported across 4 years of loss history (2021–2024)
No policy cancellations in any policy year
Premium trending downward year-over-year from 458666 (2021) to 392002 (2024)
Continuous coverage maintained with admitted, A-rated carriers: Hartford Financial Services, Chubb Limited, and Liberty Mutual Insurance
concerns: LOC-008 (1475 Corporate Woods Parkway, Uniontown, OH 44685) is missing Own/Lease designation
Two manufacturing locations (LOC-004 Dayton, LOC-007 Toledo) introduce elevated risk profile relative to warehouse-only operations
Large multi-location portfolio spanning 9 sites and approximately 1,948,500 total square feet
Mix of owned and leased properties may complicate insurable interest and valuation structure
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Four-year loss history (2021–2024): 1 claim reported in 2021 under Hartford Financial Services (policy 0000007099); 0 claims in 2022 (Chubb Limited), 2023 (Hartford Financial Services), and 2024 (Liberty Mutual Insurance). No cancellations in any year. Loss ratios not provided for any year.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC manages a 9-location Ohio portfolio totaling approximately 1,948,500 square feet. The portfolio comprises 6 warehouse facilities (LOC-001, LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-005, LOC-006, LOC-008), 2 manufacturing facilities (LOC-004, LOC-007), and 1 office location serving as corporate headquarters (LOC-009). Geographic distribution: Columbus (3 locations — LOC-001, LOC-002, LOC-009), Toledo (2 — LOC-006, LOC-007), Brooklyn (1 — LOC-003), Dayton (1 — LOC-004), Cincinnati (1 — LOC-005), and Uniontown (1 — LOC-008). One property is owned outright (LOC-006, 3200 Hill Avenue, Toledo), 7 are leased, and 1 has an undetermined ownership/tenancy status (LOC-008, 1475 Corporate Woods Parkway, Uniontown). Six additional insured/interested parties are scheduled, including 2 Additional Named Insureds, 1 Loss Payee, 1 Mortgagee, and 2 Certificate Holders.
